footer.tagline: Impulse-sized gifts to live fundraisers — tap when it matters, share with a real link, and let your network pile on without a guilt-trip ask.
footer.whyBody: Dolli is a giving layer for the way people already scroll: tiny paid gifts to causes that show up in the moment, checkout that stays quick, and feeds plus notifications built around who you follow — so support feels native, not like opening a separate “donation app.”

auth.registerBlurb: Use Google, TikTok, or Facebook — we create your Dolli profile on first sign-in.
auth.loginBlurb: Continue with a social account, or use email if your server enables it.
auth.noMethods: No sign-in methods are enabled on this server yet. Ask the operator to configure OIDC_* (Google), TIKTOK_*, META_*, or password login in the backend env.
auth.subFacebook: Same Meta account used for Instagram apps
auth.termsBlurb: By continuing you agree to our terms. Social logins may use a placeholder email for TikTok/Meta when the provider does not share one — you can still receive payouts using verified profile details later.
auth.networkError: Network error: often CORS or wrong protocol. {{hint}} Check DevTools → Network for the failing OPTIONS/POST.
auth.signedInNoProfile: Signed in, but the app could not load your profile (API error or session). Refresh the page or try again.
auth.hintStaging: Use https://staging.dolli.space (not http://). Confirm requests go to the same host for /api.
auth.hintProd: Use https://dolli.space or https://www.dolli.space (not http://). Confirm requests go to https://api.dolli.space.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This URL isn’t on Dolli yet. Head back home or browse live fundraisers.

authError.title: Sign-in problem
authError.defaultMessage: Your sign-in could not be completed. The link may have expired or already been used.

home.heroSub: Built for how Gen Z actually scrolls: tiny gifts when something matters, shareable by default, no pressure-cooker asks.
home.trendingSub: Prioritized by share velocity & social impact

steps.1d: Find a cause you care about and donate with a single tap. It only takes a dollar to make a difference.
steps.2d: Share your donation on TikTok or Instagram. Your friends see your impact and join the movement.
steps.3d: Every share creates a viral loop. Track your referrals and see how your $1 turned into hundreds.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Scroll like a feed. When something hits, you can fund it from a dollar — no essay, no guilt wall.
explore.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again.

empty.signInHint: Log in to see fundraisers and activity from people you follow.
empty.creatorsFriendsHint: Mutual follows only — when a friend has a live fundraiser, it shows here.
empty.creatorsFollowing: No fundraisers from people you follow
empty.creatorsFollowingHint: Follow organizers on campaign pages — their live fundraisers show up here.
empty.network: Nothing in your network feed yet
empty.networkHint: When people you follow donate (paid gift) or create a share link for a campaign, it appears here.
empty.friendsHint: When friends (mutual follows) donate or share a campaign, it appears here.
empty.noneHint: Try adjusting your search or filters

pwa.installBody: Open from your home screen — faster return, app-like frame, same secure web app.
pwa.addHomeBody: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen — best experience on iPhone before the native app ships.

donationSuccess.errorBody: We could not verify your payment yet. Please try again.
donationSuccess.failedBody: You can return to the campaign and try again with another method.
donationSuccess.pendingBodyHalyk: We are waiting for payment confirmation from Halyk EPAY.
donationSuccess.pendingBodyKaspi: We are waiting for payment confirmation from Kaspi Pay.
donationSuccess.kaspiNote: Kaspi Pay is currently confirmed manually after payment on the merchant side.
donationSuccess.halykNote: If you just completed the payment, refresh this page in a few seconds.
donationSuccess.stalledBody: We stopped auto-checking after several tries. If you completed payment, use “Check again” — it can take a minute for the bank to confirm.
donationSuccess.paidBody: You turned a scroll-moment into fuel for this fundraiser — optional next step: let your people know so they can pile on.
donationSuccess.passBody: If you’re signed in, your link attributes the ripple to you — Stories, WhatsApp, Telegram, QR, native share.

friends.guestBody: Friends are mutual follows — you and another member both follow each other. Sign in to see yours.
friends.title: Friends
friends.description: Mutual follows ({{count}}). Activity from friends is in Explore → Friends.
friends.emptyBody: Follow someone from a fundraiser or People search — when they follow you back, you’ll both show up here.

userSearch.title: Find people & organizations
userSearch.description: Search by name, public profile title, or organization. Then follow to tailor your feeds and notifications.
userSearch.hintEmpty: Type a query and press Search.
userSearch.subscribedToast: Subscribed — their fundraisers & milestones will surface for you.
userSearch.footerTip: Tip: open someone’s fundraiser and use Follow on the organizer card to connect your feeds.

notifications.guestBody: Follow organizers and get alerts when they launch fundraisers.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: New campaigns from people you follow
notifications.emptyBody: When someone you follow publishes a fundraiser or crosses a funding milestone (25% / 50% / 75% / 100%), it shows up here. Open Explore → Network activity to see gifts and shares from people you follow.

campaignDetail.postPublishTitle: You’re live — now spread the word
campaignDetail.postPublishBody: Share links use rich previews. Add a strong cover photo or short video if you haven’t yet.
campaignDetail.postPublishLi1: Open “Share it your way” below for every social format
campaignDetail.postPublishLi2: Copy your public link from the share dialog
campaignDetail.postPublishLi3: On iPhone: Share → Add to Home Screen for an app-like shortcut (PWA)
campaignDetail.copyShareToast: Share link copied — great for bios and DMs
campaignDetail.postPublishTip: Tip: installed Dolli from the browser feels faster on the next visit.
campaignDetail.referrerBanner: You were invited by a friend! Your donation helps reach the goal faster.
campaignDetail.curatedBadgeTitle: Recognized by Dolli for helping grow the platform.
campaignDetail.friendsBadgeTitle: You follow each other on Dolli.
campaignDetail.orgVerifiedLine: This organizer is a verified organization on Dolli.
campaignDetail.individualLine: Public activity on Dolli — helps you see who is behind this fundraiser.
campaignDetail.curatedLineSuffix: The platform badge highlights early partners and other supporters you can trust as Dolli grows.
campaignDetail.giftsHintZero: They haven’t finished a paid donation on Dolli (yet).
campaignDetail.giftsHintMany: Paid donations they’ve made to any campaign on Dolli.
campaignDetail.nsfwBodyBefore: Your NSFW filter is on. Open
campaignDetail.nsfwBodyAfter: and turn the filter off to see the full page and donate.
campaignDetail.checkoutSoonBody: Card and wallet payments are not connected on this environment yet. You can still explore campaigns and share them — donations will open here shortly.
campaignDetail.feeTransparency: Transparency: a platform fee of up to {{pct}}% is recorded on the organizer side at checkout. The amount you choose to give is unchanged.
campaignDetail.chooseAmountHint: Micro-gifts stay impulse-sized — like a super-like, but it funds real work. Change any time before you pay.
campaignDetail.halykDesc: Cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay through the payment gateway
campaignDetail.kaspiDesc: Remote Kaspi payment link for Kazakhstan-first checkout
campaignDetail.chippedIn: {{count}} people already chipped in — mostly small amounts. You’re not doing this alone.
campaignDetail.checkoutHintLive: Checkout opens on your bank’s page — Dolli never stores your card. No subscription, no guilt-trip upsell.
campaignDetail.checkoutHintSoon: When payments go live, you’ll finish in a few taps and land right back here.
campaignDetail.paymentFootLiveHalyk: Halyk EPAY opens a secure hosted payment form and returns you to Dolli after payment.
campaignDetail.paymentFootLiveKaspi: Kaspi Pay currently opens a remote payment link. Final confirmation is handled after merchant-side payment confirmation.
campaignDetail.paymentFootSoon: When payments go live, you’ll complete checkout in a few taps from this page.
campaignDetail.multiplyBody: Same energy as reposting a story — but friends land with your link so impact can compound.
campaignDetail.toastFollowSubscribed: You’ll see their new fundraisers in Following and notifications.
campaignDetail.toastNsfwDonate: Turn off the NSFW filter in your profile to donate to this fundraiser.
campaignDetail.toastPaymentsSoonDesc: We’re finishing checkout — try again soon.
